reason: Public channels are blocked by login/verification gates, so warm private contacts are the fastest proof-safe path to real signups.

batches.copy:
Quick football question: pick 3 teams for WorldCup26.

It is free to choose teams and see your private points preview. Paid leaderboard is optional later.

Use my code 26BC4B90CB:
https://worldcup26.world/login?ref=26BC4B90CB&utm_source=whatsapp-personal&utm_medium=warm-contact&utm_campaign=worldcup26_warm_contact_sprint&utm_content=football_friends_batch

Send me your 3 teams after you join.
batches.proofCommand: node campaign-public-channel-attempts.mjs --add --owner 'Nano' --platform 'WhatsApp personal' --channel "warm-contact sprint" --status 'sent' --attempt-url 'https://worldcup26.world/login?ref=26BC4B90CB&utm_source=whatsapp-personal&utm_medium=warm-contact&utm_campaign=worldcup26_warm_contact_sprint&utm_content=football_friends_batch' --detail 'WhatsApp personal: sent to <N> 10 football friends from <account> at YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm EEST; asset media/worldcup26-main-video.mp4; code 26BC4B90CB; link included; replies/signups <N>' --next-action "watch replies/signups; help anyone who asks; run referral activity after 15 minutes"
